01 — About

About Me

I'm Hitesh Sharma — a Bachelor of Pharmacy graduate with a sharp pivot into the world of business analytics and data-driven decision making. My foundation in pharmaceutical sciences gave me rigor, precision, and deep respect for evidence. Now I apply those same principles to business problems.

Currently working as a Business Analyst at Roots Analysis, I bridge the gap between complex data and actionable insights — translating numbers into narratives that move organisations forward.

I believe the most powerful professionals operate at intersections — between science and strategy, data and decisions, what is and what could be. That's the space I've chosen to build my career in.
